steps.title: Convert the percent range
steps.content: The estimate is $20\%$ with a margin of error of $3\%$, so the plausible percent range is $$20\%-3\%=17\%$$ to $$20\%+3\%=23\%$$

steps.title: Find the bead-count range
steps.content: Apply those percentages to $12{,}000$ beads: $$0.17(12{,}000)=2{,}040$$ $$0.23(12{,}000)=2{,}760$$ So the plausible number of blue beads is between $2{,}040$ and $2{,}760$. Choice C treats $360$ as a bound instead of the margin amount. The answer is B.
